title: Bonney Sees Kuma’s Memories
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on King Bekori, Unknown person #10, Bonney, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Dragon as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
